blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,422 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 26.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
